wiki.summary: Kanye West's track "Highs and Lows" was oficially released on March 28th, 2026, on his album BULLY. The track was first previewed during a listening event in Switzerland, sparking significant interest from fans and listeners worldwide. This version featured a sample of Pomme’s 2019 track "soleil soleil." However, Pomme has declined to clear the sample, forcing Kanye to update the song. The title may reference Akira Kurosawa's High and Low. Read more on Last.fm.
